issues.title: fix(install): plumb --dry-run, --json, and --fresh flags through project install path
acceptance_criteria: --dry-run shows planned installations without executing
--json produces structured JSON output
--fresh bypasses cached plans
Tests cover all three flags in project install mode

issues.title: fix(install): partial semver version resolution fails for distributed source and Homebrew recipes
acceptance_criteria: Partial semver ("0.5", "1.7", "2") resolves for distributed source recipes
Partial semver resolves for Homebrew-sourced recipes
Existing GitHub provider resolution still works
Test covers partial semver across provider types

issues.title: fix(install): distributed source approval fails in non-TTY environments
acceptance_criteria: --yes flag bypasses distributed source confirmation prompt
Non-TTY environments auto-approve when --yes is passed
Pre-registered sources proceed without prompting
Test covers non-TTY distributed source approval

issues.title: fix(actions): patchelf discovery fails during homebrew_relocate
acceptance_criteria: patchelf found via $TSUKU_HOME/tools/current/ or installed dependency path
Failure is an error (not a silent warning) when patchelf is required
RPATH set on both tool binary and shared libraries
Test covers patchelf discovery during relocation

issues.title: fix(recipes): investigate gh segfault and fix supported_libc metadata
acceptance_criteria: supported_libc removed from gh recipe (binary is statically linked)
Recipe validates successfully after change

issues.title: fix(install): idempotent install re-executes full plan for already-installed tools
acceptance_criteria: Second tsuku install -y skips plan execution for already-installed tools
Output shows "already installed" without plan step noise
Test covers idempotent install scenario

issues.title: feat(search): include distributed source recipes in search results
acceptance_criteria: Distributed source recipes appear in search results
Results indicate the source (distributed vs built-in)
AI install suggestion suppressed when tool exists in a distributed source
Test covers distributed source search
